purpose: Explain the difference between the storage Python package and the canonical runtime storage roots.

canonical_files.role: Local JSON persistence layer used by the application.

rules: If you want to change persistence behavior, edit backend/storage/repository.py and backend/config.py.
If you want live source-mode state, inspect storage/ instead of backend/storage/.
If you want packaged-app state, inspect SleepingArchiveData/storage/ next to the executable.
